title: OpenAI Makes a Smart Computer for Biology
summary: OpenAI has created a new computer program called GPT-Rosalind that helps scientists with biology. It is named after Rosalind Franklin, a famous scientist. This program is special because it is trained to understand biology tasks, like how genes work or how proteins are made. It can read lots of scientific papers and data to help researchers find important information faster. For example, if a scientist is studying a gene in the brain, GPT-Rosalind can explain brain science terms. OpenAI made it to be careful and not always agree with people, so it might say if an idea is not good. Right now, only some people in the United States can use it because OpenAI wants to make sure it is safe. Other companies have similar programs, but this one is just for biology.

questions.question: What is biology the study of?

background_read: Biology is the science of life, including how plants, animals, and humans work. Scientists use tools like computers to study genes and proteins, which are tiny parts that control how living things grow and behave. OpenAI is a company that creates artificial intelligence, which are computer programs that can think and learn like humans. They made a new program to help biologists understand complex information faster and more safely.
Article_Structure: WHO: OpenAI, a company that makes smart computer programs
WHAT: Created GPT-Rosalind, a biology-focused program to help scientists
WHERE: Available only in the United States for now
WHY: To assist with biology tasks and ensure safety by being careful

perspectives.description: GPT-Rosalind could make biology research easier and faster for scientists
